case_title: WALKER, PAULINE VS SARGANT, DAMIAN (HAIR PLAY BEAUTY SALON) et al

docket_entries.description: CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY PLAINTIFF. $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-05-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLTF'S REQUEST.
